zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern於1180年出生時，他的父親William de Lanvallei II25歲，母親Hawise Bocland24歲。他於1202年與Hawise Bassett在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年在英國艾可格亞特 布羅姆利享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾瓦爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern was born in 1180, his father, William de Lanvallei II, was 25 and his mother, Hawise Bocland, was 24. He married Hawise Bassett in 1202, in Wakerley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1217, in Great Bromley, Essex, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern est né en 1180, son père, William de Lanvallei II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hawise Bocland, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Bassett en 1202, à Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1217, à Great Bromley, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern 1180 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lanvallei II 25 und seine Mutter Hawise Bocland 24. Er hat 1202 in Wakerley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Hawise Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Great Bromley, Essex, England und wurde in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern è nato il nel 1180, il suo padre, William de Lanvallei II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Bocland, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Bassett nel 1202, nel Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1217, nel Great Bromley, Essex, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkernが1180年に生まれた時，父William de Lanvallei IIは25歳，母Hawise Boclandは24歳であった。1202年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワケルリーでHawise Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ブロムリーで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern(이)가 1180년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lanvallei II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Bocland(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 웨이켈를리에서 Hawise Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 영국 에세스 그리트 브롬리에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 워커에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern nasceu em 1180, seu pai, William de Lanvallei II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Bocland, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Bassett em 1202, em Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1217, em Great Bromley, Essex, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern родился в 1180 г., его отцу по имени William de Lanvallei II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Bocland, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Bassett в 1202 г. в местности веикирли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1217 г. в местности грит бромли, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern nació en 1180, su papá, William de Lanvallei II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hawise Bocland, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hawise Bassett en 1202, en Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1217, en Great Bromley, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
